scroll for more

Welcome to Karaoke Heaven, the home of private karaoke in London. Step into one of our exclusive karaoke booths at 7 locations across London. All our karaoke rooms are located above or below cool pubs and bars, so you get 2 venues in one! All of our private karaoke booths are individually designed and themed to create a unique experience. 

With over 10,000 songs to choose from in our extensive music library, there is something for everyone. Our database is updated weekly, so we have all of the latest karaoke hits, along with the classic karaoke tunes, with multiple languages available. Each room is studio sound-proofed and contains state of the art sound systems and microphones to ensure your singing experience is elevated to the highest level.

With multiple London karaoke locations, spread across The City, Central and East London, we have the perfect place for you to meet friends and sing your hearts out. Group bookings are available to book instantly at our venues in London for groups of 2 – 50 people. We can also cater for much larger corporate events and private karaoke bookings with space for up to 500 people at our largest karaoke venue.

Book Now

Make a karaoke booking

Choose your desired time and number of guests to check Karaoke room availability.

Private Rooms for Every Occasion

We have a wide range of private karaoke rooms available for every occasion. Perfect for birthday parties, office team building, date nights or just a fun night out with friends. Group booking are our speciality, take your pick from one of our unique private karaoke rooms. With almost 20 different rooms, we have something for everyone – Disco, Rainbow, Glam, Star, Jungle or Pink.  

Each London karaoke venue also holds various events throughout the year. Start the year with our famous New Year’s Eve Party, get glammed up at our weekly karaoke brunch or get spooky at Halloween. Some of our venues also offer open mic karaoke sessions exclusively for our karaoke booth customers. Sign up to hear about all of these events and get exclusive discounts only available to our subscribers.

Group Bookings & Exclusive Packages

All our private karaoke booths are unique, that means we will have something to suit your event. Whether it’s an important birthday party or a trip out with colleagues from the office.

Our private karaoke rooms are all part of bigger venues, that means you can stay in the venue before and after you sing. On Friday and Saturday nights, we have DJ’s or open mic karaoke, so the party doesn’t need to stop when your private karaoke booth time finishes.

We have a wide selection of food and drinks at all of our London karaoke venues, from perfectly made cocktails to bottles of bubbles. All available in discounted packages that can be ordered in advance and ready for you when you arrive in your karaoke booth. If you can’t find your favourite drink on our menu, just ask, and we will do our best to provide it for you.

Booking Your Karaoke Experience

Booking your London karaoke experience is simple, just choose the number of people in your group, select the time you would like to sing and find your nearest London karaoke venue. Unlike other karaoke venues in London, we do not charge per person, but have a set price for the room. This makes us more cost effective than our competitors and can work out to less than £5 per person for some of our bigger private karaoke rooms.

If your chosen location or time is not available, you will be directed to the closest available London karaoke venue. Our peak days are Thursday, Friday and Saturday evenings, so if you have a special date that you want to book, make sure you book well in advance to secure your preferred karaoke room. Cancellation of your private karaoke booth is available up to one month in advance or if you cancel 30 days prior to your booking, we can reschedule your slot to another date any time within the next 3 months.
